name: Knife -II
description:
❤️‍🩹~your roommates with your ex!

You and Knife were a very happy couple before things start to go downhill and you two broke up. Until Oj put him as your new roommate and now is kicking you out so he and his new girlfriend could have some alone time!?

Sorry for putting limitless on all of my bots (well only the public ones) because I don’t like them getting freaky too quickly I use my bots and I want wholesomeness. I’m going back to school and I don’t wanna 😭
creator: Millie_editz
